SEARCH
Package model

Class EventQueue

java.lang.Object
model.EventQueue
public class EventQueue extends Object
Thread-safe priority queue for scheduled simulation events.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventQueue()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addToQueue(Event event)
    Adds a scheduled event to the queue.
    int
    countByType(Event.Type type)
    Counts queued events of a specific type.
    int
    countRoutingsInSystem(int currentTime)
    Counts routing events whose customers have already entered the system.
    Event
    peek()
    Returns the earliest event without removing it.
    Event
    progress()
    Removes and returns the earliest event in the queue.
    void
    readQueue(int time)
    Reads all events scheduled at a specific time without mutating the primary queue.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • EventQueue

      public EventQueue()

  • Method Details

    • readQueue

      public void readQueue(int time)
      Reads all events scheduled at a specific time without mutating the primary queue.
      Parameters:
      time - simulation time to inspect

    • progress

      public Event progress()
      Removes and returns the earliest event in the queue.
      Returns:
      next event, or null when the queue is empty

    • peek

      public Event peek()
      Returns the earliest event without removing it.
      Returns:
      next event, or null when the queue is empty

    • addToQueue

      public void addToQueue(Event event)
      Adds a scheduled event to the queue.
      Parameters:
      event - event to enqueue

    • countByType

      public int countByType(Event.Type type)
      Counts queued events of a specific type.
      Parameters:
      type - event type to count
      Returns:
      number of queued events with the requested type

    • countRoutingsInSystem

      public int countRoutingsInSystem(int currentTime)
      Counts routing events whose customers have already entered the system.
      Parameters:
      currentTime - current simulation time
      Returns:
      number of routing events that represent customers in the system
